responsibilities: Design integrated electromechanical systems combining mechanical structures, electrical circuits, and embedded control software into functional prototypes
Develop and validate mechanical designs using CAD tools and finite element analysis to ensure structural and functional integrity
Design and debug printed circuit boards and electrical schematics for sensor, actuator, and power distribution subsystems
Write embedded firmware in C or C++ to interface microcontrollers with sensors, motors, and communication peripherals
Select and size motors, actuators, and drive electronics to meet system torque, speed, and power requirements
Build and test physical prototypes using rapid prototyping techniques such as 3D printing and CNC machining
Collaborate with software and controls teams to ensure mechanical and electrical designs support intended control system behavior
Conduct system-level testing and debugging to identify and resolve mechanical, electrical, and firmware integration issues
Document design specifications, schematics, and test results to support manufacturing handoff and design reviews
